text:
Once upon a time, in a small town where everything was exactly as it seemed, lived a curious pig named Phil. Phil knew there was something odd about his life but couldn't quite put his finger on it. Every day, he would eat, sleep, play, and moo contentedly. That was until a peculiar feathered fellow named Felix started hanging around.

Felix wasn’t like any other bird Phil had met. With feathers that shimmered like a thousand suns and an eagerness for adventure that bordered on obsession, he visited Phil every morning. At first, Phil was amused; birds didn’t usually snuggle on his bed. After a few mornings, curiosity got the better of him.

One day, Phil decided to engage Felix in conversation. “You’re quite something,” Phil remarked, eyeing the feathered marvel.
